title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Attractive entry point? The huge drop we recently experienced on the Very Large Crude Carrier (VLCC) freight rates was only seasonal. Rising oil prices and the start of refining maintenance season in China contributed to a cutback in VLCC activity (and rates) in April and May.

children.title: Attractive entry point?
children.summary: The huge drop we recently experienced on the Very Large Crude Carrier (VLCC) freight rates was only seasonal. Rising oil prices and the start of refining maintenance season in China contributed to a cutback in VLCC activity (and rates) in April and May.

children.title: The three things I would tell my clients this week
section_path: The three things I would tell my clients this week
children.section_path_text: The three things I would tell my clients this week
children.summary: The debt ceiling drama-that-wasn't is squarely behind us. An eleventh-hour deal was signed, averting the wanton default of the biggest economy in the world, and the global risk-free asset, the US Dollar, marking the 79th straight time that the debt ceiling was successfully raised.

children.title: The mixture of signals from the component indices suggests that the road to trade recovery may be bumpy.
section_path: The mixture of signals from the component indices suggests that the road to trade recovery may be bumpy.
children.section_path_text: The mixture of signals from the component indices suggests that the road to trade recovery may be bumpy.
children.summary: Amidst a tumbling spot market and a wounded market sentiment, the World Trade Organization (WTO) published this week the latest update of the "Goods Trade Barometer". WTO's barometer is a composite leading indicator for world trade, providing real time information on the trajectory of merchandise trade relative to recent trends.

children.title: Iron ore futures extended its recent rally amid hopes of further support from China
section_path: Iron ore futures extended its recent rally amid hopes of further support from China
children.section_path_text: Iron ore futures extended its recent rally amid hopes of further support from China
children.summary: Concerns over demand continue to weigh on commodity markets. Macro headwinds were also present, with a stronger USD impacting investor appetite.

children.title: Second straight month of contraction
children.summary: China's manufacturing purchasing managers' index (PMI) fell to 48.8 in May, which has marked a second straight month of contraction.
